default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Monday kickoff and calendar overview to discuss scheduling, tool setup, and meeting management.](https://fathom.video/share/BHcMgLY_y5rC-by2Ry69s7KCiok-PEJE?tab=summary&timestamp=542.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel needs more focused work time; removing him from recurring customer meetings](https://fathom.video/share/BHcMgLY_y5rC-by2Ry69s7KCiok-PEJE?tab=summary&timestamp=1419.0)
  - [New calendar management strategy: create separate calendar for weekly customer syncs](https://fathom.video/share/BHcMgLY_y5rC-by2Ry69s7KCiok-PEJE?tab=summary&timestamp=1637.0)
  - [Default.com setup initiated for improved meeting routing](https://fathom.video/share/BHcMgLY_y5rC-by2Ry69s7KCiok-PEJE?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)
  - [Team to clean up and streamline calendar invites, removing unnecessary attendees](https://fathom.video/share/BHcMgLY_y5rC-by2Ry69s7KCiok-PEJE?tab=summary&timestamp=1938.0)

## Topics

### Health Check-in

  - [Alice recovering from migraines last week, feeling better now](https://fathom.video/share/BHcMgLY_y5rC-by2Ry69s7KCiok-PEJE?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)
  - [Marcel also experienced migraines recently](https://fathom.video/share/BHcMgLY_y5rC-by2Ry69s7KCiok-PEJE?tab=summary&timestamp=593.0)

### Default.com Setup

  - [Jason sent invite to set up Default.com for improved meeting routing](https://fathom.video/share/BHcMgLY_y5rC-by2Ry69s7KCiok-PEJE?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)
  - [Marcel logged in and connected his calendar](https://fathom.video/share/BHcMgLY_y5rC-by2Ry69s7KCiok-PEJE?tab=summary&timestamp=794.0)
  - [Team to finalize setup (matching Calendly settings, availability, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/BHcMgLY_y5rC-by2Ry69s7KCiok-PEJE?tab=summary&timestamp=953.0)
  - [Considering creation of alias email (e.g., ceo@) for certain tools/access](https://fathom.video/share/BHcMgLY_y5rC-by2Ry69s7KCiok-PEJE?tab=summary&timestamp=1300.0)

### Office Visit Request

  - [Sam requested to visit office Wednesday at 3:30/4 PM](https://fathom.video/share/BHcMgLY_y5rC-by2Ry69s7KCiok-PEJE?tab=summary&timestamp=1331.0)
  - [Marcel unavailable due to meeting with Eric about new office plans](https://fathom.video/share/BHcMgLY_y5rC-by2Ry69s7KCiok-PEJE?tab=summary&timestamp=1372.0)
  - [Team to politely decline, suggest rescheduling in a few weeks](https://fathom.video/share/BHcMgLY_y5rC-by2Ry69s7KCiok-PEJE?tab=summary&timestamp=1403.0)

### Calendar Management

  - [Marcel requests blocking mornings for deep work (8 AM - 11 AM)](https://fathom.video/share/BHcMgLY_y5rC-by2Ry69s7KCiok-PEJE?tab=summary&timestamp=1464.0)
  - [Remove Marcel from all recurring customer meeting invites](https://fathom.video/share/BHcMgLY_y5rC-by2Ry69s7KCiok-PEJE?tab=summary&timestamp=1474.0)
  - [Only add Marcel as optional for specific weeks when needed](https://fathom.video/share/BHcMgLY_y5rC-by2Ry69s7KCiok-PEJE?tab=summary&timestamp=1498.0)
  - [Create new shared calendar for weekly customer syncs](https://fathom.video/share/BHcMgLY_y5rC-by2Ry69s7KCiok-PEJE?tab=summary&timestamp=1637.0)
  - [Clean up invites: remove declined attendees (Marcel, Jimmy) and former employees](https://fathom.video/share/BHcMgLY_y5rC-by2Ry69s7KCiok-PEJE?tab=summary&timestamp=1938.0)

### Marcel's Priorities

  - [Needs significant downtime for company re-architecting](https://fathom.video/share/BHcMgLY_y5rC-by2Ry69s7KCiok-PEJE?tab=summary&timestamp=1669.0)
  - [Preparing for all-hands meeting and creating training content](https://fathom.video/share/BHcMgLY_y5rC-by2Ry69s7KCiok-PEJE?tab=summary&timestamp=1698.0)
  - [Requested to decline 1:1 with Dave, suggesting he meet with Matthew instead](https://fathom.video/share/BHcMgLY_y5rC-by2Ry69s7KCiok-PEJE?tab=summary&timestamp=1690.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Alice to remove Marcel from accessible recurring customer meeting invites](https://fathom.video/share/BHcMgLY_y5rC-by2Ry69s7KCiok-PEJE?tab=summary&timestamp=1938.0)
  - [Bridget to message Matthew about calendar invite changes](https://fathom.video/share/BHcMgLY_y5rC-by2Ry69s7KCiok-PEJE?tab=summary&timestamp=1950.0)
  - [Create new shared calendar for weekly customer syncs (tackle on Friday)](https://fathom.video/share/BHcMgLY_y5rC-by2Ry69s7KCiok-PEJE?tab=summary&timestamp=2100.0)
  - [Ask Vitz to clean up Kyle's calendar invites (remove Marcel, Jimmy, former employees)](https://fathom.video/share/BHcMgLY_y5rC-by2Ry69s7KCiok-PEJE?tab=summary&timestamp=2116.0)
  - [Finalize Default.com setup (match Calendly settings, availability)](https://fathom.video/share/BHcMgLY_y5rC-by2Ry69s7KCiok-PEJE?tab=summary&timestamp=953.0)
  - [Decline Sam's office visit request, suggest rescheduling in a few weeks](https://fathom.video/share/BHcMgLY_y5rC-by2Ry69s7KCiok-PEJE?tab=summary&timestamp=1403.0)
  - [Block Marcel's mornings (8 AM - 11 AM) for deep work](https://fathom.video/share/BHcMgLY_y5rC-by2Ry69s7KCiok-PEJE?tab=summary&timestamp=1464.0)

action_items.description: Respond to Sam - decline office visit request for Wed 3:30/4pm. Suggest rescheduling in few weeks.
Add deep work block to Marcel's calendar Thu morning 8-11am.
Remove Marcel from all recurring customer meetings possible. Remove Jimmy/Andre if declined/left company.
Msg Matthew re: removing Marcel from recurring customer meetings. CC Alice.
Message Vitz - remove Marcel/Jimmy from Kyle's recurring customer meetings. Clean up invites (remove ex-employees).
